title: Promise To Pay
description: Borrower commitment to pay arrears, captured by the ICE Mortgage Servicing Promise To Pay API. Documents the promise along with reason codes to support collection workflows.

promiseAmount.description: Amount the borrower committed to pay in USD.

promiseDate.description: Date on which the borrower has committed to make the payment.

reasonCode.description: Standard reason code for the delinquency (e.g., JOB_LOSS, MEDICAL, REDUCTION_OF_INCOME, NATURAL_DISASTER).
